text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems a festival is being held nearby today.
Since Kitasan Black loves festivals so much, she
invites me to check it out with her.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Wooow! I just love the atmosphere at festivals! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yakisoba, okonomiyaki, grilled squid! I wanna try
everything!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... O-okay, but if I volunteer to carry the
portable shrine, I'll be able to work up a good
sweat and burn it all off! Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Now that I have a plan, let's go, Trainer! ♪
choice_data_list: If you overeat, even carrying the portable shrine won't burn it all off.
Yup, eat to your heart's content!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Y-you think so? Yeah, you're right...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Then, uh, I'll try to eat in moderation!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It's super fun going around all the food stalls and
finding stuff I wanna eat! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oh! Look! Those grilled carrots look delish!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
The aroma, texture, and shape are all perfect! I'll
take one, please! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Hehe. ♪ Time to eaaat!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Munch, munch, munch...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Munch, munch... Gulp...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black silently eats her way through the
grilled carrot without answering my question.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Mmm! That was suuuper tasty!
choice_data_list: You were so focused on your food.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Wait, did you say something to me while I
was eating?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry! I didn't hear you at all! When I eat
carrots, I go into a trance of sorts...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I just get so into savoring the depth and
sweetness of the carrot... Ahaha...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sight of Kitasan Black apologizing sheepishly
is quite a heartwarming one.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Aw yeah! Time to let loose and have fun!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, sir! Can I have one cotton candy,
please?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey! Why don't we split an order of takoyaki?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
The grilled corn looks good, too! ♪ I'm gonna
grab one!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh... That was all so delicious! ♪ What should
we sample next?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but worry about Kitasan Black... She's
eating so much that even carrying a portable
shrine might not burn it all off.
